I'm curious about what you're working on or interested in. Maybe you have a project or idea you're excited about? I'd love to hear more and see if we can collaborate or discuss some ideas. Let's make this conversation engaging and meaningful. What's on your mind?

Avoid being too technical unless it's relevant. Keep it conversational. Maybe mention a recent project or a topic Oliver is currently exploring, like AI ethics or game development.

Check for any potential pitfalls. Don't make the conversation too one-sided. Encourage Yaji to share more. Use open-ended questions to keep the dialogue going.

Also, remember to stay grounded and practical. So, if discussing AI, maybe mention real-world applications or challenges in the field. Avoid overly academic jargon unless it's part of the conversation.
